CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Gerald Chan, Esq., appearing for John Yuji; Horie. Notice having been given and there being no objection or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Mary Hinds. (212)

Amended Petition Of Guardian Ad Litem Ofr Compromise Of Disputed Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Sep-19-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Amend Judgment hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Steven Babbro, Esq. for Plaintiff Janell Adair, the guardian ad litem also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants and amended the order of the compromise as follows:
Compromise of $2,250,000.00
Medical lien of $350,000.00.
Costs $25,357.37
Total Attorneys fees: $741,547.56.
Net Recovery in the amount of $1,133,095.07 of which $1,117,368.75 to be use to purchase an annuity or annuities from The Travelers Insurance Company, in the name of the Estate of Hari Smith, The Remaining Net Recovery sum of $15,726.32 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank Of America-Excelsior Branch, 15 Ocean Ave., San Francisco, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
AMENDED ORDER signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Steven Babbro and Arnold Laub, Esq. for Plaintiff Janell Adair, the guardian ad litem, Hari Smith a minor is also present.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise of the Medical lien of $350,000.00.
Costs $28,174.86.
Total Attorneys fees: $741,547.56.
Net Recovery in the amount of $1,133,095.10 to be use to purchase an annuity or annuities from The Travelers Insurance Company, in the name of the Estate of Hari Smith.
The Remaining Net Recovery sum of $15,726.35 to be deposited into a blocked account with
Bank Of America, 15 Ocean Ave., San Francisco, until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.
